# SCORE What to Expect from Mentoring Process

Last reviewed for BOSS Library ingestion: 2026-06-21

## BOSS Library tags
score, mentoring-expectations, process, handoff-preparation

## Resource purpose
Sets expectations for a SCORE mentoring session, including confidentiality, client preparation, mentor role, session length, and follow-up.

## How the BOSS AI Librarian should use this resource
Use this when a user is nervous about mentoring, has never used SCORE, asks what happens in a session, or needs to prepare a useful agenda for a mentor.

## Best-fit BOSS lifecycle stage
All stages.

## Best audience
Entrepreneurs preparing for their first or next SCORE mentoring session.

## Route the user here when
The entrepreneur is ready to request a SCORE mentor or already has a mentor but needs to understand how to use the relationship effectively.

## Useful intake questions before referral
- What would make the first session successful for you?
- What are the top 1-3 questions you want the mentor to answer?
- What facts or documents can you bring: idea summary, customer assumptions, costs, revenue, market research, or questions?
- Are you looking for accountability, industry feedback, financial review, marketing help, operations help, or formation guidance?

## Key resources or subresources
- First session focus: goals, challenges, questions, immediate priorities, and next steps.
- Mentor role: listen, ask questions, share experience, provide resources/referrals, and help with accountability.
- Client role: come prepared, be open to feedback, take action, and follow up.
- Sessions may be virtual, phone, email, or in-person, depending on mentor and chapter availability.
- Follow-up may include templates, tools, workshops, additional mentors, or referrals.

## BOSS routing notes
- Do not imply that SCORE mentors do the entrepreneur’s work for them. They guide, advise, and provide resources.
- Encourage users to bring a short written summary of their business concept and current decision.
- For BOSS, this file pairs well with the mentor handoff checklist file.

## Related SCORE links
- How mentoring works: https://www.score.org/how-mentoring-works/
- Find a mentor: https://www.score.org/mentors/
- SCORE Houston: https://www.score.org/tx/houston/

## Response pattern for BOSS
Use this resource as a routing destination, not as a substitute for professional legal, tax, lending, procurement, or compliance advice. For time-sensitive workshops, deadlines, prices, contact details, or eligibility rules, send the user to the live source URL first.
